title: Select Game
menuMtpDesc:
Transfer mod files via USB connection
 - Faster transfer speed, but may fail when transferring folder-type mods with a large number of small files
 - For mods with many small files, it is recommended to pack them into a ZIP archive first, or use FTP for more stable transfers
menuFtpDesc:
Transfer mod files via Wi-Fi
 - Slower transfer speed; recommend using a third-party FTP client with 6 threads enabled for better efficiency
transitEmpty: No mods found in transit. Please upload mods to transit first. Press  menu → Add Mod.
tidInvalid: Invalid game TID, please check and try again!
